_comment: ED (Druid) combat config — example for earth/ice hunting, sio-capable @ 1920x1080

spells.label: exori tera
spells._comment: F2 = Terra Strike (20 mana, 2s cd) — main filler

spells.label: exevo tera hur
spells._comment: F3 = Terra Wave (210 mana, 4s cd) — frontal AoE

spells.label: exevo gran mas frigo
spells._comment: F5 = Eternal Winter (1050 mana, 40s cd) — big ice AoE

healing._comment: Druid healing config — ED heals with exura/exura gran + sio for party
healing._note: ED is the party healer — sio_target should be set to EK name
